module_info.docstring:
P0 Regression Tests: Datetime Naive/Aware Handling.

Background: We fixed a bug where SQLite (which stores naive datetimes) was compared
against timezone-aware Python datetimes, causing:
    TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes

These tests prevent recurrence of this bug.

Test Cases:
1. _naive_utc() returns naive datetime when given None
2. _naive_utc() strips timezone from aware datetime
3. _utcnow_naive() model factory returns naive datetime
4. All model default_factory fields produce naive datetimes
5. File reservation expiration comparison works (original failure point)
6. AgentLink timestamp comparisons work
7. MessageRecipient timestamp updates work

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-yhk

classes.name: TestNaiveUtcHelper
classes.docstring: Test the _naive_utc() helper function from app.py.

methods.name: test_naive_utc_returns_naive_when_given_none
methods.docstring: _naive_utc() should return current time as naive datetime when dt=None.

methods.name: test_naive_utc_returns_naive_when_given_no_args
methods.docstring: _naive_utc() with no args should return naive datetime.

methods.name: test_naive_utc_strips_timezone_from_aware_datetime
methods.docstring: _naive_utc() should strip timezone from aware datetime.

methods.name: test_naive_utc_converts_non_utc_to_utc_then_strips
methods.docstring: _naive_utc() should convert non-UTC timezone to UTC first, then strip.

classes.name: TestUtcnowNaiveFactory
classes.docstring: Test the _utcnow_naive() model factory function from models.py.

methods.name: test_utcnow_naive_is_close_to_current_utc
methods.docstring: _utcnow_naive() should return time close to current UTC.

classes.name: TestModelDefaultsProduceNaiveDatetimes
classes.docstring: Verify all model default_factory fields produce naive datetimes.

methods.name: test_agent_timestamps_are_naive
methods.docstring: Agent inception_ts and last_active_ts defaults should be naive.

methods.name: test_agent_link_timestamps_are_naive
methods.docstring: AgentLink created_ts and updated_ts defaults should be naive.

methods.name: test_project_sibling_suggestion_timestamps_are_naive
methods.docstring: ProjectSiblingSuggestion created_ts and evaluated_ts defaults should be naive.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_expiration_comparison_no_error
functions.docstring:
File reservation expiration queries should not raise datetime comparison errors.

This is the original failure point where comparing in-memory datetime objects
with SQLite DATETIME columns failed due to naive/aware mismatch.

functions.name: test_file_reservation_release_and_renew_datetime_handling
functions.docstring: Test that release and renew operations handle datetimes correctly.

functions.name: test_agent_link_expiration_comparison
functions.docstring: Test that agent link expiration handling works with naive datetimes.

functions.name: test_message_recipient_timestamp_updates
functions.docstring: Test that message read/ack timestamps are set correctly as naive.

functions.name: test_inbox_fetch_with_since_ts_datetime_handling
functions.docstring: Test that fetch_inbox with since_ts handles datetime comparisons correctly.
